title: What to Expect From Opendoor's Q2 Earnings
text: Opendoor (NASDAQ:OPEN) will announce Q2 earnings results Tuesday after market hours. Recent Performance: In the last quarter, Opendoor surpassed revenue expectations by 9.3%, reporting $1.15 billion in revenues. The company achieved an exceptional quarter with EBITDA guidance exceeding analyst projections and reported 2,946 homes sold. Q2 Expectations: Analysts anticipate flat year-over-year revenue growth at $1.50 billion, a significant improvement from the 23.5% decline in the same period last year. The company is expected to report an adjusted loss of -$0.02 per share. Market Context: Opendoor's real estate services peers have posted strong results: CBRE delivered 16.2% revenue growth while Newmark reported 19.9% growth. Both companies beat analyst estimates and saw stock price increases following earnings. Stock Performance: The stock has surged 255% over the past month and currently trades at $2.22.
